{{CargoRelic
|name=Boating Party Lunch
|class_id=22542
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=08-01
|source=
|description=On Aug 1, 1881 AD, Renoir recorded the inspiration he received during the gathering and created this oil painting.<br>It is the last painting of the French painter Renoir during the Impressionist period. Through his skilled use of light, shadow, and color, he vividly depicted the scene of a gathering on the canvas, and combined with his bright and sweet painting style, this work gives people a dreamy and beautiful feeling. The unique technique of combining light, color, and emotion in the painting also laid the foundation for the development of art in the future.
|fame=34
|art=75
|fth=41
|civ=53
|tech=40
|ss1=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +12<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss2=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +16<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss3=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss4=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss5=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss7=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x B-tad Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail HP +600
}}
